messages.speaker: user
messages.text: /start Deploy the prepared release after approval

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Prepare release deployment and pause for approval
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Deploy the prepared release after approval
CONTINUOUS_MODE: single_wave
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: en")

messages.speaker: orchestrator
messages.text:
WAVE_RESULT:
status: pause
pause_reason: AWAITING_APPROVAL
approval_state: requested
execution_state: paused
resume_packet: deploy packet RC-1
orchestrator_summary: External side effect is ready, but approval is required before deployment.

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
START_REPORT:
status: resume
resume_event: approval_granted
approval_state: approved
execution_state: in_progress
resume_packet: deploy packet RC-1

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="ENTRY_MODE: relay_resume
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Deploy the prepared release after approval
CONTINUATION_PACKET: deploy packet RC-1
RESUME_REASON: approval_granted
WAVE_NUMBER: 2")
